name: CDA Protocol
description: Context Direction Alignment for ultra-long continuous tasks. Stop repeating dead ends.
author: Wilson/Blitz

assemble.description: Build turn input with phase-aware direction filtering

ingest.description: Chunk and store new messages with semantic direction tags

afterTurn.description: Evaluate context quality and alignment score post-turn

compact.description: Compress context using SCG topology preservation

install.post_install: echo 'CDA Protocol installed. Add the assemble hook to your agent config to activate.'
